subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Hearken unto the call of this Husayn, at the time when His head lay beneath the sword of destiny from aforetime [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی اسمع ندآء هذا الحسین حین الذی کان راسه تحت سیف القضاء من اولی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
